initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cards.id, foreign_data.language, foreign_data.name, set_translations.translation
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.code
JOIN set_translations ON sets.code = set_translations.setCode
WHERE sets.code = '10E'
  AND cards.convertedManaCost = 5;
